description_long: This object depicts a distorted adult human figure with exaggeratedly elongated limbs and body, giving it a surreal, stretched appearance. The head is relatively small and detailed, with short, curly hair, while the arms and legs are unnaturally thin and extended. The figure appears to be wearing a long-sleeved top and pants, with visible shoes on both feet. The clothing is form-fitting and the shoes are athletic in style. The overall form is highly abstracted, with the torso and limbs blending into each other and the environment, making the figure appear as if it is being pulled or stretched in multiple directions. The surface of the object is smooth with a matte finish, and the colors are predominantly shades of purple, pink, and brown.
description: A highly distorted adult figure with elongated limbs, wearing fitted clothing and athletic shoes, rendered in smooth, matte purple and pink tones.
description_view_0: The head and upper torso are most visible, with the right arm and leg stretched downward and the left arm raised, showing the figure's face and hair.
description_view_1: The figure is seen from the side, emphasizing the extreme elongation of the arms and torso, with the head and one shoe visible at opposite ends.
description_view_2: The back of the figure is visible, with both legs and shoes extended outward, and the head turned away, highlighting the stretched limbs.
description_view_3: A side-rear view showing the elongated torso and limbs, with the head and one shoe at the far ends, and the body appearing to twist.
